Plaintiff Daniel Pierini'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment (From 12-1)
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DANIEL PIERINI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Russell Robinson (255.0462) for plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion was continued from December 5, when the court granted plaintiff's request to set aside the judgment of dismissal and set January 4 for a hearing on defendants'' motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution. The motion to dismiss is denied due to the strong policy favoring deciding cases on their merits and the absence of any prejudice to defendants from the delay. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Plaintiff Daniel Pierini'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment (From 12-1)
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Jan-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUSSELL A. ROBINSON, TEL. NO. 255-0462 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARTIN H. DODD, TEL. NO. 399-3841 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING SOLELY ON THE GROUND OF THE ATTORNEY'S ERROR IN FILING A TIMELY OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DISMISS AND IS ENTITLED TO RELIEF BASED ON THE DECLARATION OF ATTY. ROBINSON. THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING RULING: Plaintiff Daniel Pierini'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment and Dismissal UNDER CCP 473 (B) IS GRANTED. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 4, 2012 TO BE HEARD ON THE MERITS. THE COURT VACATED ON THE RECORD THE NOV. 22, 2011 JUDGMENT ENTERED IN THIS CASE AS BEING DUPLICATIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Mo For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction Against Pltf Daniel Pierini And Monetary Sanction Against Pltf Daniel Pierini And His Attorney Russell Robinson For Failure To Obey Court Orders And For Misuse Of The Disco Process
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Alice M. Peiler, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Pacwest Solutions, Inc. and Edd Ozard
Russell A. Robinson, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Daniel Pierini
After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
Defendant Pacwest Solutions, Inc. and Edd Ozard's Motion for order imposing terminating sanction against plaintiff Daniel Pierini; and monetary sanction against plaintiff Daniel Pierini And his attorney Russell A. Robinson for failure to obey court orders and for misuse of the discovery process:
Defendant's request for terminating sanctions is denied without prejudice to a future motion for issue or evidentiary sanctions.
1. As to the subject special interrogatories, all objections are deemed waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege; plaintiff shall serve full, complete, code compliant, and verified supplemental responses to defendant's special interrogatories (set one) on or before July 27, 2009;
2. Defendant shall tender payment of the pending $590.00 sanction order on or before July 27, 2009;
3. Further monetary sanctions shall issue in the sum of $590.00 to run against plaintiff and his counsel of record, payable on or before August 17, 2009. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
